context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct multi-region deployment policy. Key patterns: accessing provider config at tfplan.configuration.provider_config.aws.expressions.region.constant_value (a deeply nested path), EU data residency check combining resource tag and region, and a has_replication helper with multiple function heads for S3 vs DynamoDB.

checklist.name: Provider region check via configuration path
checklist.description: The policy reads the AWS provider region from `tfplan.configuration.provider_config.aws.expressions.region.constant_value` and denies if it is not in the approved set

checklist.name: EU data residency deny rule
checklist.description: A deny rule triggers when a data-holding resource (`aws_s3_bucket`, `aws_rds_cluster`, or `aws_dynamodb_table`) is created with tag `DataResidency == "EU"` and the provider region is not in `{"eu-west-1", "eu-central-1"}`

checklist.name: has_replication helper with multiple function heads
checklist.description: A `has_replication` (or equivalent) helper has separate function heads for S3 (checking `replication_configuration`) and DynamoDB (checking `count(replica) > 0`), and is used in a warn rule for high-criticality resources
